info.title: SEO Snapshot API
info.description: SEO Snapshot API. Analyze a public URL and return on-page SEO metadata, headings, image alt coverage, links, social tag signals, and plan-dependent SEO analysis. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Analyze a public URL and return on-page SEO metadata, headings, image alt coverage, links, social tag signals, and plan-dependent SEO analysis.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
